training_tokens.as_published: 11.2T tokens (Model Summary: 'pretrained on 11.2T tokens with a staged curriculum of web, code, math and reasoning data'); the Training section table of the same card rounds to '11T'

pretraining_context_length.as_published: Trained on 64k context; 128k supported via YaRN extrapolation (not used for this anchor)

ac_config_adaptations: Tied embeddings: SmolLM3 ties input/output embeddings (true total ~3.08B: 2,812,280,832 layer params + 262,668,288 embedding + norms). AC's parameter ledger always counts 2*vocab*d_model (untied) and its loader only warns on tied_embeddings, so AC's N for this config is 3,337,764,864 (+8.6% over the true count). We keep the published vocab_size (a real architecture fact that also feeds vocab_residual) and accept the modest spine-N inflation as a known AC limitation; metadata.params declares the AC-ledger value (3.34B) to stay consistent with the 2% ledger gate.

NoPE: SmolLM3 omits RoPE on 3 of every 4 layers (no_rope_layer_interval 4). AC's dense schema has no NoPE concept; positional_encoding records the RoPE base (5e6). No AC quality term reads NoPE patterns.
No other adaptations: GQA (16/4), SwiGLU 11008, vocab 128256 are all first-class in AC.

prediction_inputs.note: Staged-curriculum unique-token count is not published; unique left null (D_eff = D). Evaluation context == pretraining context so context_utility is identically zero.
